productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Run Lite+ Grey Sports Shoe
description: Offering premium cushioning in a lightweight design, the nike Air Max Run Lite+ shoe offers absolute support and breathable comfort to make your runs all the more fun. The welded plastic support at the midfoot and streamlined stability Air Sole unit with a foam pillar construction make this a perfect shoe for those runners who demand that extra stability and cushioning. Upper Heavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole with a visible nike Air unit in the heel for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for optimal traction on various surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
